name: Programmers

seo.title: Programmers — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Programmers: Programmers by Grepp — Korean coding test, hiring and learning APIs with webhook integrations for ATS.

when_to_use: Coding test platform integration for technical hiring
Webhook-triggered ATS updates on candidate completion
API access to candidate performance data for analysis
Korean developer assessment platform with grading API

pros: Hiring plus learning APIs in one product
cons: Niche vs HackerRank or CodeSignal globally
review.verdict: The default coding assessment platform for Korean tech hiring, largely irrelevant outside that market.
review.best_for: Companies hiring developers in South Korea who need local-language assessments
review.not_for: Global teams where HackerRank or CodeSignal offer broader reach
